# Reproduction

Case: `public_repository_canary_case`
Bundle: `59098709ecf8f4befba8dad69b2606b89f5862f09a2ef9460789d7e8160596f2`

## Run

```bash
npm run 'test:reproduce'
```

## Expected failure

The oracle matched all 3 clean candidate runs and did not match the control.
